issue_body:
## Issue Description
while the app is running, sometimes it sends an error like this:

TypeError: window.require(...).canCheckStatusRankingPosterGating is not a function window.WWebJS.sendMessage

## Reproduction Steps
this is an intermittent issue.

1. Start the app
2. Complete the authentication if you have not done
3. Keep the app running
4. The error sometimes comes up

## Code Sample
```typescript

```

## User Setup

| WhatsApp | Type |
|---|---|
| **Account Type** | WhatsApp Business |
| **Authentication Strategy** | LocalAuth |
| **WhatsApp Web Version** | 0000000 |
| **whatsapp-web.js Version** | 1.34.7 |

| Environment | Version |
|---|---|
| **Browser Type** | Chrome |
| **Browser Version** | 146.0.7680.31 |
| **Phone OS Version** | Android 12 |
| **Running OS Version** | MacOS 26 |
| **Node.js Version** | 18.19.0 |

## Checklist
- [x] **I use the latest released version of whatsapp-web.js.**
- [x] I have searched existing issues and confirmed this is not a duplicate.
- [x] I have verified this is a library issue, not a problem with my code.
